# Synthetic HIV dataset

**Type:** Synthetic, generated by `data/_generate_synthetic.py`.

**License:** [CC BY-NC 4.0](../../LICENSE-CONTENT)

**Purpose:** Pedagogical exemplar for the Chapter 17 case-study notebooks.

**Seed:** 20260509

**Real data alternatives:** UNAIDS AIDSinfo (https://aidsinfo.unaids.org); the DHS Program (https://dhsprogram.com) for survey-based prevalence.
